title: man pages: Add an example about --no-prune
body:

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

@tyll thank you for your contribution to our proct.  Your content looks fine.  When double checking something on this PR, i noticed that I think we are missing an `EXAMPLE` "header" before the examples section.  Would you be so kind to add that as part of your PR.  If you are not inclined, no worries, we will accept it.
nvm on my comment, it looks like #26370 addresses this.
